_README: SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH. Populated from Arul MS's CV. The frontend renders from it and the backend bot answers questions from it.

person.name: Arul MS
person.title: AI/ML Engineer & Full-Stack Developer
person.tagline: I build end-to-end AI solutions — from ML models and REST APIs to AI-powered automation workflows.
person.bio: Final-year AI & ML Engineering student with hands-on internship experience in AI automation and data analytics. Published researcher with 4 papers and a Best Paper Award, specialising in deep learning for cybersecurity. I build end-to-end solutions — from ML models and REST APIs to AI-powered automation workflows — and I'm actively seeking a full-time role in AI/ML, full-stack development, or automation engineering.

bot.name: ARIA
bot.greeting: Hi! I'm ARIA, Arul's AI guide. Ask me about his AI/ML work, research papers, projects, or experience.

projects.name: Hybrid Deep Learning Anomaly Detection System
projects.summary: A hybrid CNN-LSTM model achieving 98% detection accuracy for identifying network anomalies and suspicious activities. Awarded Best Paper.

projects.name: AI-Based Fake ID & Image Forgery Detection
projects.summary: A deep learning pipeline using image forensics and classification models to detect forged identity documents and manipulated images.

projects.name: AI Automation Workflows
projects.summary: End-to-end AI automation workflows built with n8n and Make, integrating LLM APIs with custom business logic to improve operational efficiency.

research.title: Hybrid Deep Learning Anomaly Detection System
research.summary: Developed a hybrid CNN-LSTM model achieving 98% detection accuracy for identifying network anomalies and suspicious activities.

research.summary: Built a deep learning pipeline using image forensics and classification models to detect forged identity documents and manipulated images.

research.title: Securing the Cloud: Deep Learning + ORCA Optimization
research.summary: Proposed an intelligent cloud security framework combining DL-based threat classification with ORCA metaheuristic optimisation for adaptive threat detection.

research.summary: Designed a CNN / RNN / Transformer ensemble to detect and classify advanced cyber threats with improved accuracy across real-time network traffic data.
